zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Piers Roscelyn於1273年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Thomas de Roscelyn29歲，母親Catherine de Boteler25歲。他和Mabel至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1308年享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Roscelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Joslin
meanings: from the Old French personal name Goscelin, Gosselin, Joscelin, from ancient Germanic Goz(e)lin, a diminutive of a short form of compound names based on the element goz (from gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Geat’ or ‘Goth’; see Goss ).
alternatively, perhaps a diminutive of the Old French personal name Josse (Old Breton Judoc); see Joyce .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Piers Roscelyn was born in 1273, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Roscelyn, was 29 and his mother, Catherine de Boteler, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mabel. He died about 1308, at the age of 36.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Piers Roscelyn(이)가 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Roscelyn(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Boteler(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mabel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1308년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.
